title: Fast Fiction Factory Review Memory Dedup
purpose: Focused local Review Hub operating improvement that records review memory, Acceptance Ladder, Review Dedup Gate, and Non-Redundant Review Card requirements so future reviews do not repeat the same target, evidence, and axis while preserving source-span/model-boundary evidence without starting model/API work.
generated_from: User review: Review Hub too vertically long, English-first, layered between story and project information, and Raw Story Memo sticky behavior feels awkward
validation_command: & { $files = @('public/review/index.html', 'tools/fff-state.mjs', 'tools/fff-extract-local.mjs', 'tools/fff-source-span-review-pack.mjs', 'artifacts/artifact-manifest.json', 'artifacts/ARTIFACTS.md', 'artifacts/review-memory-dedup-smoke-result.json', 'artifacts/review-procedure-lock-smoke-result.json', 'artifacts/source-span-routing-review-pack.json', 'artifacts/source-span-routing-triage-result.json', 'docs/review/review-memory-dedup.md', 'docs/review/review-procedure.md', 'docs/review/review-hub-ia-mode-split.md', 'docs/review/source-span-routing-review-pack.md', 'docs/review/current-status.md', 'docs/review/model-api-boundary-spec.md', 'docs/data-model.md', 'artifacts/model-api-boundary-envelope.example.json', 'artifacts/model-api-boundary-smoke-result.json', 'artifacts/sample-project-state.json', 'artifacts/current-project-state.json', 'artifacts/sample-extraction-payload.json', 'artifacts/extraction-validator-smoke-result.json', 'scripts/operator/open_review.ps1', 'scripts/operator/open_review.sh'); $missing = $files | Where-Object { -not (Test-Path $_) }; if ($missing) { throw ('Missing files: ' + ($missing -join ', ')) }; $manifest = Get-Content artifacts/artifact-manifest.json -Raw -Encoding UTF8 | ConvertFrom-Json; if ($manifest.artifact_id -ne 'fff-review-memory-dedup-001') { throw 'Manifest artifact id mismatch' }; if ($manifest.preserved_review_procedure_lock_artifact_id -ne 'fff-review-procedure-lock-001') { throw 'Preserved review procedure artifact mismatch' }; if ($manifest.preserved_review_hub_ia_mode_split_artifact_id -ne 'fff-review-hub-ia-mode-split-001') { throw 'Preserved Review Hub IA artifact mismatch' }; if ($manifest.preserved_source_span_artifact_id -ne 'fff-source-span-routing-review-pack-001') { throw 'Preserved source-span artifact mismatch' }; if ($manifest.preserved_model_api_boundary_artifact_id -ne 'fff-model-api-boundary-spec-001') { throw 'Preserved model/API boundary artifact mismatch' }; if ($manifest.review_input_mode -ne 'freeform') { throw 'Review input mode mismatch' }; $requiredMemoryFields = @('artifact_id', 'subject', 'current_scope', 'prior_review_count', 'latest_user_signal', 'latest_user_signal_summary', 'accepted_scope', 'not_accepted_scope', 'next_nonredundant_axis', 'repeated_review_allowed', 'review_reset_trigger'); $memory = @($manifest.review_memory); if ($memory.Count -lt 3) { throw 'Review memory entry count mismatch' }; @('fff-review-procedure-lock-001', 'fff-review-hub-ia-mode-split-001', 'fff-source-span-routing-review-pack-001') | ForEach-Object { $artifactId = $_; $entry = $memory | Where-Object { $_.artifact_id -eq $artifactId }; if (-not $entry) { throw ('Missing review memory entry: ' + $artifactId) } }; foreach ($entry in $memory) { foreach ($field in $requiredMemoryFields) { if (-not ($entry.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains $field)) { throw ('Missing review memory field ' + $field + ' for ' + $entry.artifact_id) } } }; @('candidate_seen', 'positive_signal', 'diagnostic_representative_accept', 'provisional_baseline', 'stress_test_required', 'bounded_adjustment', 'production_candidate', 'production_acceptance') | ForEach-Object { if ($manifest.acceptance_ladder -notcontains $_) { throw ('Missing acceptance ladder stage: ' + $_) } }; @('same_target_check', 'same_axis_check', 'evidence_changed_check', 'decision_value_check', 'prior_signal_check', 'user_fatigue_check') | ForEach-Object { if ($manifest.review_dedup_gate -notcontains $_) { throw ('Missing review dedup gate check: ' + $_) } }; @('target', 'axis', 'prior_review_count', 'prior_signal_summary', 'what_changed', 'what_this_review_decides', 'input_mode', 'not_asking', 'completion_signal') | ForEach-Object { if (-not ($manifest.non_redundant_review_card_template.PSObject.Properties.Name -contains $_)) { throw ('Missing Review Card template field: ' + $_) } }; $html = Get-Content public/review/index.html -Raw -Encoding UTF8; @('fff-review-memory-dedup-001', 'Review memory / dedup gate', 'docs/review/review-memory-dedup.md', 'artifacts/review-memory-dedup-smoke-result.json', 'fff-review-procedure-lock-001', 'fff-source-span-routing-review-pack-001', 'fff-model-api-boundary-spec-001', 'externalCallAllowed: false', 'data-review-mode="story"', 'data-mode-target="source"', 'data-mode-panel="source"') | ForEach-Object { if (-not $html.Contains($_)) { throw ('Missing required Review Hub text: ' + $_) } }; if ($html -match 'position:\s*sticky') { throw 'Unexpected sticky positioning remains' }; $doc = Get-Content docs/review/review-memory-dedup.md -Raw -Encoding UTF8; @('Review Memory Fields', 'Acceptance Ladder', 'Review Dedup Gate', 'Non-Redundant Review Card Template', 'Reporting Guardrails') | ForEach-Object { if (-not $doc.Contains($_)) { throw ('Missing review memory doc section: ' + $_) } }; $smoke = Get-Content artifacts/review-memory-dedup-smoke-result.json -Raw -Encoding UTF8 | ConvertFrom-Json; if (-not $smoke.passed) { throw 'Review memory smoke failed' }; node tools/fff-source-span-review-pack.mjs artifacts/extraction-adapter-fixtures artifacts/extraction-adapter-outputs artifacts/local-extraction-adapter-expansion-smoke-result.json artifacts/source-span-routing-review-pack.json; Get-ChildItem artifacts/extraction-adapter-outputs -Filter *.json | ForEach-Object { node tools/fff-state.mjs validate-extraction $_.FullName; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { throw ('Adapter output validation failed: ' + $_.Name) } }; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate artifacts/current-project-state.json; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate artifacts/sample-project-state.json; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate-extraction artifacts/sample-extraction-payload.json; node tools/fff-state.mjs validate-extraction-fixtures artifacts/extraction-negative-fixtures; $pack = Get-Content artifacts/source-span-routing-review-pack.json -Raw -Encoding UTF8 | ConvertFrom-Json; if (-not $pack.passed) { throw 'Source-span review pack failed' }; if ($pack.cross_fixture_summary.fixture_count -ne 3 -or $pack.cross_fixture_summary.total_elements -ne 36 -or $pack.cross_fixture_summary.source_span_mismatches -ne 0 -or $pack.cross_fixture_summary.missing_source_refs -ne 0 -or $pack.cross_fixture_summary.unsafe_visual_routing -ne 0 -or $pack.cross_fixture_summary.non_held_review_defaults -ne 0 -or $pack.cross_fixture_summary.human_owned_decision_adopt_suggestions -ne 0) { throw 'Source-span review pack guard mismatch' }; Write-Output 'Review memory dedup validation passed' }
